wholesale.quality_assurance_desc: Every batch undergoes rigorous quality checks.

wholesale.b2b_support_desc: Dedicated account managers for your sourcing needs.
wholesale.enquiry_subtitle: Fill out the form and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.

cta.title: Ready to Order?

hero.title: Our Story
hero.description: Shree Kumaravel Modern Rice Mill is a trusted partnership firm based in Kangayam, Tamil Nadu, dedicated exclusively to premium-quality rice. With a strong focus on purity, hygiene, and consistency, we bring carefully milled rice that meets the everyday needs of households and bulk buyers. Our journey is built on honest trade, modern milling practices, and long-term customer trust.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description1: Our mission is to deliver only high-quality rice varieties processed with care and precision. By combining traditional values with modern milling techniques, we ensure every rice maintains its natural taste and nutritional value.
mission.description2: We are committed to fair pricing, reliable supply, and uncompromised quality.

values.title: Why Choose Us?
values.premium_desc: Every batch of rice is carefully milled, cleaned, and packed under hygienic conditions to ensure freshness and superior rice quality.
values.specialist_desc: We deal only in rice. Our complete focus on rice allows us to maintain consistent quality, purity, and taste across every variety we offer.
values.delivery_desc: Our efficient logistics network ensures your order reaches your doorstep fresh and on time.
values.customer_desc: Your satisfaction is our priority. We offer easy returns and responsive customer support.
values.organic_desc: We prioritize organic farming practices and ensure our products are free from harmful chemicals.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions or need assistance? We're here to help.
contact.get_in_touch_desc: Visit our store or reach out to us via phone or email. We love hearing from our customers!

shipping_info.free_delivery_desc: Free delivery on orders over ₹899 across Kangayam. Same-day or next-day delivery available.
shipping_info.express_delivery_desc: Same-day or next-day delivery within Kangayam only, based on order time and location.
shipping_info.returns_refunds_desc: Easy 7-day returns. Exchange or refund available for damaged or incorrect items.
